meaning: v.使再循环,反复应用n.再循环,再生,重复利用
examples: The objective would be to recycle 98 percent of domestic waste.
The power of the Green movement in Germany has made that country a leader in the drive to recycle more waste materials.
Meanwhile, if it does have too many, it could recycle them profitably in the merchant market.
Come campaign time, they might even recycle an old Club for Growth ad from last year.
